overview: Bomma Institute of Technology and Science (BITS), established in 2006 by the Bomma Rajeswara Rao Educational Society, is a private technical institution located in Khammam, Telangana. It offers a wide range of undergraduate and postgraduate programs in engineering and management, aiming to provide high-quality education and industry-aligned skills to students in the region.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45-50% in PCM + TS EAMCET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level counseling (TGCHE) based on entrance exam ranks. 70% of seats are filled under the Convener Quota (Category A) and 30% under the Management Quota (Category B).
admissions.importantDates: TS EAMCET 2026: May 9 - 11, 2026; TS ICET 2026: May 13 - 14, 2026; TS POLYCET 2026: May 13, 2026.

campus.specialNote: The campus features a collaboration with Microsoft for a creative innovation center. It is situated behind the Eenadu office in Khammam, providing a blend of urban accessibility and a focused academic environment.

contact.address: Behind Eenadu Office, Allipuram, Khammam, Telangana - 507138
